message:
refactor(io,ufunc,linalg): consolidate genfromtxt_full args into config struct, expand ufunc coverage

Introduce GenFromTxtConfig to replace the 8-argument genfromtxt_full
signature, eliminating the too_many_arguments clippy lint. Expand
fnp-ufunc with additional ufunc implementations and update fnp-linalg
with minor fixes surfaced during the sweep.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
